title: Patch<T> Keep→null silent footgun without skip_serializing_if guard
description: Patch<T>::serialize maps both Keep and Clear to JSON null. If a contributor adds a Patch<T> field and omits skip_serializing_if = "Patch::is_keep", Keep silently serializes as null, which deserializes back as Clear — causing data loss with no compile-time warning. Fix: add a doc-level note to Patch<T> and/or make Serialize panic on Keep (debug only) rather than produce null.
